title: Login Problem
description: User cannot log in to the account after entering the correct password.

title: Payment Issue
description: Customer tried to make a payment but the transaction failed.

title: Invoice Download Error
description: User cannot download the invoice from the billing section.

title: Profile Update Failed
description: Customer is unable to update profile information.

title: Password Reset Not Working
description: Reset password link is not working properly.

title: App Loading Slow
description: Application takes too much time to load dashboard.

title: Notification Not Received
description: User is not receiving email notifications.

title: Order Status Not Updating
description: Customer cannot see updated order status in dashboard.

title: Account Verification Problem
description: User did not receive the account verification email.

title: Unable to Upload File
description: Customer cannot upload files in the document section.

title: Dashboard Data Not Showing
description: User cannot see analytics data on the dashboard.
